Est. 2014 • Kerala's Premier Builders

Creating Spaces Where
Life Meets Art.

Based in the heart of Malappuram, Heavens Builders specializes in luxury residential architecture and structural innovation that redefines the Kerala landscape.

Explore Our Work
Who We Are

The Heavens Philosophy

At **Heavens Builders**, we don't just build walls; we craft legacies. Located in Chelari, Moonniyur, we have spent years mastering the balance between traditional Kerala aesthetics and 2026's smart-home technology.

Our approach is client-centric, ensuring every square foot reflects your personality while adhering to the highest structural safety standards in the industry.

150+

Projects

10+

Years

100%

Quality

Our Expertise

Specialized Services

Custom Architecture

Bespoke villa designs that maximize natural light and airflow for the tropical Kerala climate.

Interior Curation

Minimalist and luxury interior finishing that transforms a house into a sanctuary.

Vastu & Planning

Scientific Vastu-compliant layouts integrated with modern structural engineering.

HEAVENSBUILDERS

Architecture • Construction • Interiors

Bringing architectural dreams to life with precision and passion since 2014.
